ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_row_loc" INTEGER /* Row location of the trade in the trading log */,
  "original_price" REAL /* Original price of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Trade price of the trade */,
  "avg_buy_price" REAL /* Average buy price of the trade */,
  "trade_slippage" REAL /* Slippage of the trade */,
  "trade_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the trade */,
  "trade_total" REAL /* Total value of the trade */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "trade_profit" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "crypto_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategy ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., demo, live) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of account creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last account update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the account */,
  "balance_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the balance is kept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_trades" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade within the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id", "trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_types" (
  "trade_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade type */,
  "trade_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade type (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Net worth of the portfolio */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the portfolio */,
  "total_fees" REAL /* Total fees associated with the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of portfolio creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last portfolio update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crypto_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "crypto_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the cryptocurrency was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the holding (e.g., held, sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crypto_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolio ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crypto_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "crypto_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., exchange name) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last user update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the account (e.g., trader, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "log_entry" TEXT /* Detailed log entry for the trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profit_loss_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit and loss statement */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the profit/loss calculation */,
  "basis" TEXT /* Basis for the profit/loss calculation (e.g., FIFO, LIFO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profit_loss_statements_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategy" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of strategy creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of last strategy update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategy_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
